div.p: Aspiring Data Analyst · Andhrapradesh,India

Turning raw data into actionable insights. Passionate about Python, SQL, Power BI & storytelling through data. Collect data from databases, surveys, or websites Clean and organize raw data Analyze data using tools and techniques Create charts, dashboards, and reports Find patterns and trends Help companies make data-driven decisions

h1.p: Hi! I'm Gunti Vinay, B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science & Data Science at Swarnandhra College of Engineering & Technology, Narasapur, Andhra Pradesh.
I specialize in Python, SQL, Power BI,and Tableau, Excel to collect, clean, analyze, and visualize data that drives real-world decisions.
Currently sharpening my skills through hands-on projects, online certifications, and learning from industry leaders — one dataset at a time.

div.p: Breaking complex problems into data-driven solutions
Power BI & Tableau dashboards that tell stories
Data wrangling, EDA, and automation scripts
Google certifications & AI/ML coursework
Modern frontend and backend solutions
A toolkit built for modern data analytics — from querying databases to building interactive dashboards.
Real-world analytics projects that demonstrate data cleaning, exploration, visualization, and storytelling.
Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing 3 years of movies,TV shows distribution year-wise content growth analysis,Records analyzed-8000+.

div.h3: Amazon prime video Data Analysis Dashboard
div.p: End-to-end exploratory data analysis on a telecom dataset. dataset spans nearly a century(1920-2021)enabling long-term trend analysis of content production and growth, Seaborn visualizations, and maps,piecharts.
Complex SQL queries on a retail database to find top-selling products, seasonal trends, and inventory gaps. Used CTEs, window functions, and subqueries.
Tableau story-based visualization of global COVID-19 trends, vaccination rates, and country-wise comparisons using WHO data.
Industry-recognized credentials that validate my skills in data analytics, AI, and cloud technologies.

div.style: transform: translateX(0px);

div.p: A timeline of my academic journey, internships, and key milestones in becoming a data analyst.

div.div: Swarnandhra collage of Engineering and technology ,WestGodavari-Narsapur
div.p: Studied core computer science subjects including databases, programming, and statistics. Built a strong foundation for data analytics.

div.h3: Python for Data Science – Self Study
div.p: Mastered Python fundamentals, Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib through self-paced learning and completing 5+ Kaggle notebooks.
Completed an 8-course professional certificate covering data cleaning, analysis, visualization, and storytelling using R and Google Sheets.
Completed an 5-course professional certificate covering data cleaning, analysis, visualization.
A glimpse into my workspace, events, and personal milestones.
Thoughts on data analytics, learning resources, and career tips I've written or curated.

div.h3: How I Went from Zero to Data Analyst in 12 Months
div.p: A practical guide to the resources, projects, and mindset shifts that helped me build a career in data analytics from scratch.

div.h3: 5 Power BI Tips Every Beginner Should Know
div.p: From DAX basics to designing clean dashboards — the five Power BI skills that made the biggest difference in my projects.

div.h3: Python is an object-oriented,dynamically typed programming language
div.p: Python is one of the leading programming languages used by developers around the world. Its simplicity, versatility, and strong ecosystem make it suitable for beginners as well as experienced developers. From web applications to artificial intelligence, Python supports a wide range of modern technological needs. Understanding the features of Python programming language helps learners evaluate why it is often recommended as the first language for programming education and professional development.
A beginner-friendly breakdown of ROW_NUMBER, RANK, LAG, and LEAD with real examples — no jargon, just clarity.
My structured learning path from fundamentals to advanced analytics — phase by phase.
Open to internships, collaborations, and entry-level data analyst opportunities. Let's talk!

div.h3: I'd love to hear from you
div.p: Whether you have an opportunity, a question about one of my projects, or just want to talk data — my inbox is always open!
